# Certifyied

> Certifyied is the leading Google 360 Provider and digital marketing company in India and Kochi, offering SEO, social media, PPC, and web development services.

Certifyied helps ambitious brands scale through data-driven digital marketing. We offer 360° Google Services, Digital Marketing, Performance Marketing, Social Media Marketing, SEO Optimization, and Web & App Development. Our services are designed for businesses in India and Kochi seeking measurable growth, local visibility, and expert support.
